name: Maharagwe (Spiced Red Beans in Coconut Milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the beans in a large pot and cover with water. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer until tender.
2. In a separate pan, sauté onions in oil until golden brown.
3. Add tomatoes, salt, turmeric, chili peppers, and coconut milk to the bean mixture. Stir well.
4. Return the beans to the pot and stir gently. Simmer for several minutes until the beans are very tender and the tomatoes are cooked.
5. Serve over rice or a stiff porridge.
